title: urostigma subtriplinervium
intro: Urostigma subtriplinervium, also known as the three-veined urostigma, is a plant species that belongs to the genus Urostigma and family Urostigmaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Urostigma subtriplinervium include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as providing antiseptic and antifungal properties. Urostigma subtriplinervium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
